webhook_id.description: ID of the Webhook that triggers the Event.

organization_id.description: ID of the Webhook Event Organization.

project_id.description: ID of the Webhook Event Project.

domain_id.description: ID of the webhook event domain.

values.unknown_type: If unspecified, the type of the Webhook Event is unknown by default
values.email_queued: The email was received and is in preparation to be sent to the recipient servers
values.email_dropped: The email was sent but hard-bounced by the recipient server
values.email_deferred: The email was sent but soft-bounced by the recipient server. In this case, the sending of the email will be automatically retried
values.email_spam: The email resource was identified as spam by Scaleway or by the recipient server
values.email_mailbox_not_found: The email hard-bounced with a "mailbox not found" error
values.email_blocklisted: The email was blocked before it was sent, as the recipient matches a blocklist

values.unknown_status: If unspecified, the status of the Webhook event is unknown by default
values.sending: The Webhook event is being sent
values.failed: The Webhook event cannot be sent after multiple retries

data.description: Data sent to the Webhook destination.

created_at.description: Date and time of the Webhook Event creation. (RFC 3339 format)

updated_at.description: Date and time of last Webhook Event updates. (RFC 3339 format)

email_id.description: Optional Email ID if the event is triggered by an Email resource.
